visual_description: A static, low-angle shot reveals a dark, cavernous hall filled with rubble and debris. In the center of the frame, a large, ornate, gothic-style wooden door with intricate carvings stands slightly ajar, framed by the arches of the ruined structure. The lighting is dim and atmospheric, casting deep shadows across the piles of broken wood and stone that litter the floor. In the top right corner, a watermark with the Chinese characters "风行网" is visible. The audio is filled with a tense and suspenseful orchestral score. Low, ominous strings create a deep, resonant hum, establishing a dark and foreboding atmosphere. The music slowly builds in volume and intensity, with layers of string instruments weaving a complex, melancholic melody that evokes a sense of dread and anticipation, as if something significant and unsettling is about to happen. The camera cuts to a close-up of a man with pale skin and platinum blonde hair peeking from behind a dark, textured pillar. He has a look of intense fear and apprehension on his face, his eyes wide and his mouth slightly agape. The background is out of focus, showing the same dark, stone environment. The "风行网" watermark remains in the top right corner
